name: healrise
description: HEALRISE — PWA (app/), Strapi-5-Backend (strapi/) und Landing-Page (landing/ → dist/). Skripte orchestrieren alle Teilprojekte.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run test:scripts && npm run test:strapi && npm run build && npm run build:landing
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:offline
